data.body:
I was "spoiled" on the ending of Metal Gear Solid V, a game I'd waited multiple years for, on day -5 from release. Was it shocking? Eh kinda. Did I put like 90 hours in the game anyway? Yeah totally. Was i still deeply affected by *actually experiencing it*? Absolutely. 

Mileage may vary of course.
